title: What To Expect From TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Q3 2024 Earnings
text: TeraWulf Inc is set to release its Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 12, 2024. Analysts expect Q3 revenue of $34.28 million with earnings of -$0.03 per share. The company's projected annual revenue stands at $157.78 million with expected earnings of -$0.10 per share. Over the past 90 days, analyst estimates have shifted downward. Full-year 2024 revenue expectations decreased from $158.24 million to $157.78 million, while 2025 projections fell from $304.48 million to $294.75 million. In Q2 2024, the cryptocurrency miner reported revenue of $35.57 million, slightly exceeding expectations. However, earnings of -$0.03 per share underperformed analyst forecasts, resulting in a 7.28% stock decline. The consensus recommendation from eight brokerages is Outperform, with price targets averaging $7.07.
